```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;text-align:center;">

 <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.18em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.3em;">practice 04</div>
 <div style="font-size:1.4em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;line-height:1;margin-bottom:0.9em;letter-spacing:-0.01em;">Decompose complex tasks.</div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.8em;text-align:left;margin-bottom:0.85em;">

  <div style="background:#FCEEEC;border:1.5px solid #D45F47;border-radius:12px;padding:0.85em 1em;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;margin-bottom:0.4em;">
    <span style="width:1.4em;height:1.4em;border-radius:50%;background:#D45F47;color:#F8F7F0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.75em;font-weight:900;">‚úï</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#7A2418;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;">one shot</span>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#7A2418;margin-bottom:0.3em;">multi-hour task ‚Üí <strong>fails</strong></div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#9B8EA0;">‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ crashes</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#E5F2EE;border:1.5px solid #2C8475;border-radius:12px;padding:0.85em 1em;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;margin-bottom:0.4em;">
    <span style="width:1.4em;height:1.4em;border-radius:50%;background:#2C8475;color:#F8F7F0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.75em;font-weight:900;">‚úì</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#1F5E54;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;">eight sprints</span>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#1F5E54;margin-bottom:0.3em;">same task, split ‚Üí <strong>succeeds</strong></div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#2C8475;">‚ñÆ ‚ñÆ ‚ñÆ ‚ñÆ ‚ñÆ ‚ñÆ ‚ñÆ ‚ñÆ</div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="background:#F4F2FB;border-radius:10px;padding:0.65em 0.95em;font-size:0.6em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;">
  Each sprint: <span style="color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;">single deliverable</span> ¬∑ <span style="color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;">success criteria up front</span> ¬∑ <span style="color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;">fits one context</span> ¬∑ <span style="color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;">reset between</span>
 </div>

</div>
```
